title: Sweet Crispy German Potato Wrap
description: This sweet and crispy German dish features a blend of harissa spice for a spicy kick, tandoor-style seasoning to give it a unique flavor profile, and is served in a light, savory wrap made from low-carb potatoes.
instructions: Peel and boil potatoes until tender. Drain and let cool slightly.
In a mixing bowl, combine boiled potatoes, olive oil, salt, harissa paste, tandoori powder, and basil leaves.
Press the potato mixture into 4-6 individual wraps using parchment paper to keep them from sticking to your hands or baking sheet.
Bake for about 20 minutes until golden brown. Serve hot with a side of yogurt or sauce if desired.
